enrichment.summary: Kyle vlogs about his second day in Boulder, recapping a late-night cleaning and reorganizing session, a store run to exchange ink and buy supplies, visiting his mom and son to pay rent, and his current routine of watching DS9 while jump-roping and browsing Wikipedia.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: stayed up until 6:30am cleaning and reorganizing, views it positively
frustrated — considers it a bummer since he likes listening to music loudly

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Yesterday I was really busy all night until about 6:30 in the morning.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I cleaned the refrigerator and under the refrigerator.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I reorganized the whole house.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I didn't clean up the outside of the living room.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I bought a fan and put it up on my ceiling to activate my beanie hat.

claims.claim: I put reflectors on the fan so you can see what's going on.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The fan setup will be awesome for when I sing and dance.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got up at around one o'clock.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to the store to exchange the ink because I got the wrong ink.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to my mom and son's place to pay rent.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I might do a YouTube video about D.S. Mediti later.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I lost my good earphones, which is a bummer because I like to listen to music.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I had two good earphones, but both vanished.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: This video is 21 minutes long.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I feel like I've talked enough in this video.
